reviewer.evidencePolicy: Only mark evidenceStatus=satisfied for the current on-demand test gate claim covered by package.json wiring, checked-in on-demand test files, and a passing npm run test:on-demand execution.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names a maintainer npm gate and its checked-in test ownership, which is deterministic repo behavior.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by package.json wiring from test:on-demand to scripts/on-demand/*.test.mjs, checked-in on-demand test files, AGENTS.md gate wording, and a passing npm run test:on-demand execution.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep npm run test:on-demand and scripts/on-demand/*.test.mjs aligned when moving heavier self-dogfood workflow checks.
